name: Creamy Peach Soup (Webb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the peaches and white wine in a blender until smooth, then pour into a chilled bowl.
2. Add the buttermilk or yogurt, ricotta cheese, orange liqueur, and honey to the peach mixture.
3. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour to allow flavors to meld.
5. Divide the soup among six chilled soup bowls.
6. Garnish each bowl with a mint leaf before serving.
Nutritional information: Calories: 109. Calories from fat: 10. Total fat: 1g. Saturated fat: 1g. Cholesterol: 10 mg. Sodium: 77mg. Carbohydrate: 20g. Dietary fiber: 2g. Sugars: 17g. Protein: 5g.
